name: Windows Pcap Drivers
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Cian Heasley
SIGMA Title: Windows Pcap Drivers
SIGMA Description: Detects Windows Pcap driver installation based on a list of associated .sys files.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%pcap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%npcap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%npf%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%nm3%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%ndiscap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%nmnt%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%windivert%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%usbpcap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%pktmon%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Windows Pcap Drivers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%pcap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%npcap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%npf%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%nm3%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%ndiscap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%nmnt%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%windivert%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%usbpcap%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%pktmon%') AQL filter query
